transcript.text:
Finish Jumbo Ramen within 20 minutes to get the meal for free
It's going to be delicious
Is there a fire?
What?
[Everyone evacuated]
[It's time]
[Jumbo Ramen]
[Size comparison]
I don't think I can finish in time
[Will she be able to do it?]
Hello everyone~
I've been at my restaurant today
I came outside to eat
This is near my restaurant
It's called San Cho Me Ramen near Isu Station
They have this thing called the Jumbo Ramen Challenge

Finish it within 20 minutes and the meal is free
Is there a fire?
[Alarm going off]
It's over
Ramen is so good I had it last month
Hello
I called earlier
[Camera #1]
[Camera #2]
[Pro streamer]
Do you guys have the Jumbo Ramen? Yes
Tonkotsu Jumbo Ramen & Coke, please
How many servings is that?
4 servings
And the time limit is 20 minutes? Yes, the meal will be free
20,000 Won if you fail the challenge (~$18 USD)

Here's the coke and the timer
I'm excited I wonder how big it is
[This big]
Thank you
Am I allowed to cool it down? Yes
You're going to beat the challenge regardless
No, I'm going to take my time So I might not beat it
You can cool it down first
The bowl is huge
Bean sprouts, char siu (pork), green onions
Eggs
4 eggs, since it's 4 servings
I wonder if this will be enough
Serving bowl
[Looking really cute in comparison]
That's a lot of bean sprouts I'm doomed

I'm not good at eating bean sprouts
Check the noodles too
I don't think I will finish it in time
I'll go ahead and start
That's a lot of noodles
It's steaming hot
[Will she be able to beat it?]
Tasty
That's really good
It's good
Isn't it a good deal to get this much food for 20,000 Won?
This bowl is ginormous
Char siu
[No food is going to waste]
It doesn't matter It's a challenge mukbang
[She is pacing herself well]

Yummy
I feel like I ate a good amount And there's still this much left
Yum
The broth is very savory
It's very flavorful
So good
Egg
Hot
I want to save the char siu
Let's just leat 1 more
[Making a noodle tower]
Look
Amazing
[12 minutes have elapsed]
It's still delicious
Eating fast vs eating a lot is totally different

I'm not a slow eater though
It's a little challenging because of the bean sprouts
8 minutes and 48 seconds left
[Karaage on the house]
I have to try 1 now
Yum
Maybe he thought I won't be able to finish both of these in under 20 minutes
I can do it
But too many scallions
[The bowl is empty now]
[Speeding up now because she wants her photo on the wall]
[50 seconds left!]
[I can't be defeated]
[Let's speed it up]
[10 seconds left!]
[The result?]

[Success!]
You beat the challenge
I still have food in my mouth
I will come back later to order a lot of food
I really want my picture up there
[Jumbo Ramen's wall of fame]
Can we take a photo of you? Of course
Like this
Thank you
It's not out yet
I will pay for the Karaage
I will pay for it and eat it I feel bad
I had this for free, so
This bowl is huge
Unbelievably huge
It's out now

I'm full That was a great meal
It tasted really delicious
Thanks everyone~
Here in the middle
[Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
